description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Hosting Controller 6.1 before Hotfix 3.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the ForumID parameter in (1) DisableForum.asp and (2) enableForum.asp.  NOTE: it was later reported that the vulnerability is present in 6.1 Hotfix 3.3 and earlier.
